claims.text: Author of a 120-star open-source LLM evaluation harness

evidence.snippet: evalharness — task-agnostic evaluation harness for LLMs. 120 stars, 14 forks, 61 commits.

trust.note: The GitHub repository 'evalharness' has 120 stars, which corroborates the claim about the author's open-source LLM evaluation harness.

claims.text: Published a detailed methodology post on avoiding contamination in LLM eval sets

evidence.snippet: On contamination in LLM eval sets — why held-out splits leak, and a cheap detection recipe.

trust.note: The evidence is a blog post on the topic of contamination in LLM eval sets, which supports the claim of publishing a detailed methodology post on this subject.
